topics.title: Learning tracks
topics.subtitle: Self-study on any topic — with a roadmap and adaptive quizzes
topics.emptyText: Add a topic in any subject — the platform breaks it into steps and picks quizzes for your level.
topics.deleteMsg: “{{title}}” and all practice history will be deleted.
topics.newTrackSub: We'll break the topic into steps and pick quizzes for your level.
topics.topicPh: e.g. Present Perfect, Fractions, Cellular respiration

study.title: Daily session
study.subtitle: Review what's due — across all your tracks and vocabulary
study.emptyText: Come back later — cards appear here on schedule. Add new ones on track steps and in your vocabulary.
study.cardHint: Recall the answer, then flip the card
study.weakSub: Subtopics where your mastery is still low — worth going back and practising.

cards.cardsReturn: Cards will come back for review on schedule.

ideas.title: What can I study?
ideas.intro: Create a track on any topic — the platform breaks it into steps and generates quizzes adapting to your level. No teacher needed.
ideas.schoolText: Fractions, photosynthesis, the Pythagorean theorem, World War II
ideas.langText: Present Perfect, Polish cases, Spanish verbs
ideas.skillsText: React basics, SQL queries, Excel formulas, copywriting
ideas.booksText: Breaking down a textbook chapter, article notes, lecture terms
ideas.examText: SAT, IELTS, entrance exams — by topic

vocab.title: Vocabulary
vocab.subtitle: Words, terms and concepts — as flashcards with spaced repetition
vocab.emptyReviewText: New words appear here on schedule. Add more words to study.
vocab.emptyText: Add your first words on the “Add” tab.
vocab.emptyLang: No words in this language yet
vocab.deleteMsg: “{{word}}” will be removed from your vocabulary.
vocab.fillWordTr: Fill in the word and translation
vocab.bulkPh:
cat - gato
dog - perro
house - casa
(or via Tab: word⭾translation)
vocab.rule2: Separate word and translation with a dash « - » or Tab.
vocab.rule3: A hyphen inside a word (long-term) is fine.
vocab.topicPh: e.g. food in a restaurant, for working as a waiter, school biology
vocab.aiNote: Words are added to your vocabulary right away, with an example sentence in the target language.
vocab.pickLang: Choose the word language and native language above
vocab.enterTopic: Enter a topic for the set
vocab.topicIntro: Describe what you need the words for — the more specific, the more accurate the set:

detail.shared: Track is now visible to your teacher
detail.shareTitle: Your teacher will see this track's weak spots and can assign a targeted quiz
detail.noVerified: No new verified ones found — try “less verified”
detail.cardsHint: Cards are created on roadmap steps — the “Cards” button.
detail.historyEmpty: No completed tests yet. Start with the first roadmap step.
detail.locked: 🔒 Reach {{gate}}% on the previous step — or open anyway
detail.cardsEmptyTitle: No cards for this step yet
detail.cardsEmptyText: We’ll generate a set of flashcards for this subtopic — or make them from your own text.
detail.importSub: Paste your notes/material — AI will make flashcards strictly from the text (without making things up).
detail.importPh: Paste text here (lesson notes, an article excerpt, definitions…)
detail.importShort: Paste some text (at least a couple of sentences)
detail.trackReviewSub: Cards from all steps that are due for review
detail.trackReviewEmptyText: New cards will appear here on schedule.
detail.genTest: Generating a test for this step…
detail.testHint: the test adapts to your level
detail.checkHintPost: — the result is saved to history right away and updates your step mastery.
detail.reviewSub: Your answers, the correct options and explanations.
